# CTFrameProgression.leftToRight

**Case**

Lines stack left to right for vertical text.

## Declaration

```swift
case leftToRight
```

## Constants

- **CTFrameProgression.topToBottom**: Lines stack top to bottom for horizontal text.
- **CTFrameProgression.rightToLeft**: Lines stack right to left for vertical text.
